claim: NotebookLM's Deep Research agent automatically builds research plans, searches hundreds of websites, fact-checks, and generates comprehensive reports
actionable: Use NotebookLM Deep Research for literature reviews and fact-gathering; let the agent handle the research while you focus on synthesis
source_title: NotebookLM Just Changed AI Forever - Gemini 3.5 Research Agent, AI Videos & Deep Research (2026)

claim: NotebookLM provides 1 million token context window, enabling processing entire books, research archives, and company reports simultaneously
actionable: With 1M token context, include full documents instead of summaries; this reduces retrieval errors and improves context grounding
source_title: NotebookLM Just Changed AI Forever - Gemini 3.5 Research Agent, AI Videos & Deep Research (2026)

claim: NotebookLM's cloud code execution allows agents to write, run, and verify complex calculations on uploaded data without user programming
actionable: Use cloud code execution for data analysis; agents can handle data wrangling, visualization, and statistical analysis autonomously
source_title: NotebookLM Just Changed AI Forever - Gemini 3.5 Research Agent, AI Videos & Deep Research (2026)

claim: Interactive mode allows interrupting AI podcast hosts during playback to ask questions about the generated content in real time
actionable: Use interactive podcast mode for exploring research findings; ask follow-up questions mid-stream to drill into specific areas
source_title: NotebookLM Just Changed AI Forever - Gemini 3.5 Research Agent, AI Videos & Deep Research (2026)
